title: May 5
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 5''' is the 125th day of the year (126th in leap years). There are 240 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1921|1921]] – [[Sydney Walker]] is born.
*[[1930s#1932|1932]] – [[Stan Goldberg]] is born.
*[[1940s#1940|1940]] – [[Lance Henriksen]] is born.
*[[1940s#1941|1941]] – [[Jon Foster]] is born.
*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Richard E. Grant]] is born.
*[[1960s|1960]] – [[Phil Eason]] is born.
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Adam Hughes]] is born.
*[[1983]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Arcade Game]]'' is released by [[Atari]].
*[[1997]] – ''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace 1]]'' published.
*1999 – [[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: In the Empire's Service (TPB)|''Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: In the Empire's Service'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Celebration II]] ends.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Inside the Worlds of Star Wars: Attack of the Clones]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith (video game)|''Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith'' video game]] released.
*2005 – ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' expansion pack released.
*2005 – ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine 57]]'' begins shipping to newsstands.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Art of the Bad Deal]]'' published as part of [[Free Comic Book Day]].
*[[2015]] – ''[[Always Bet on Chopper]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars Character Encyclopedia: Updated and Expanded]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Star Wars: Graphics]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars Adventures Free Comic Book Day 2018]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars: A New Hope (Disney Die-Cut Classics)|''Star Wars: A New Hope'' ''Disney Die-Cut Classics'' adaptation]] published.
*2020 – [[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (Disney Die-Cut Classics)|''Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'' ''Disney Die-Cut Classics'' adaptation]] published.
*2020 – [[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (Disney Die-Cut Classics)|''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'' ''Disney Die-Cut Classics'' adaptation]] published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian - The Art & Imagery Collector's Edition, Volume One]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – [[The High Republic Adventures (2021) 4|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2021) 4]] published.
*2021 – [[War of the Bounty Hunters Alpha 1|''War of the Bounty Hunters Alpha'' 1]] published.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Sanctuary: A Bad Batch Novel]]'' to be reprinted in paperback.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures — The Complete Phase II]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[The Mandalorian: The Manga, Vol. 4]]'' to be published in the United States.
*2026 – [[Star Wars Insider 237|''Star Wars Insider'' 237]] to be published.
<noinclude>
